'''''Shotel''''' was a [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruiser]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]. ''Shotel'', along with ''[[Nagan]]'', were sent to reinforce the [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] ''[[Red Claw]]''{{'s}} position and assist [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] in destroying the [[Z-Kopsh|Kopsh]].

{{Ship-stub}}
